subcodes.first_line: The glorious Book hath been sent down from the presence of the mighty King unto them that have believed in God and have turned with radiant hearts unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب عزیز نزل من لدن ملک عظیم الی الذین آمنوا بالله و اقبلوا بقلوب نورآء الی
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @call to action, @empty learning; false spirituality, @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
